title: Kanbus clock: darken default 12-o'clock dot and set auto-info-seconds default to 30

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing defaults tweak: (1) darken default top 12-o'clock marker by two Radix steps in pixooclock palette mapping; (2) set kanbus_clock --auto-info-seconds default to 30; update tests/docs accordingly.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Defaults updated test ping: when kanbus_clock runs without --auto-info-seconds, this notice should hold for 30s.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Code/tests/docs updated. Validation: uv run python -m py_compile demos/pixooclock.py demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_demo_three_hand_clock.py tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (35 passed). Left in_progress pending your visual confirmation of (1) darker top dot and (2) 30s auto-info default hold.
